title: Credentials, Signing, Retries, Timeouts, and Client Resilience · Runtime Contract: Sigv4 Region Time
summary: A process accepts static keys from request data, retries every failure beyond its caller deadline, and records neither attempt identity nor ambiguous write state. Predict the representation, storage, trust, cost, and recovery evidence before inspecting a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the sigv4 region time increment in bounded S3 request and retry state machine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain SigV4 canonical request, region, service, signed headers, payload mode, clock, and credential scope without hand-building production signatures.
Use short-lived credential providers with explicit workload identity, refresh ownership, least privilege, and redaction.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Predict Sigv4 Region Time · Theory Sigv4 Region Time
